title: Mini Factories
description:
Welcome to Mini Factories!

  The Datapack that enables you to have a farm for almost every item in the game!
  No resource pack needed!
body:
# Mini Factories
Welcome to **Mini Factories by MM-13**!

The Datapack that enables you to have a farm for almost every item in the game!
No resource pack needed!

Think about an item and there will probably be a farm for it in this datapack!
A guide for the farms is obtainable with the /function command.
The start of every build goes as followed:
- Place a dropper pointing upwards
- Place an item frame on a side face

In the Guide:
- The first item goes in the item frame
- The second item goes on top of the dropper

To have the speed upgrade:
- place emerald ore behind the dropper
⇒ ORDER IS: item frame > dropper > emerald ore


Commands to load the pack:    
- /reload
- /function "factories:factory_farm1/factory1" (!1.19!)
- /function "factories:factory10"
- /function "factories:factory20"

Command for the Building Guide (1.19 only):
- /function "factories:minifactories_guide"


<details>
<summary>Builders Guide (All Versions) UNCOMPLETED!!!</summary>

**All Mini Farms use a dropper pointing up with an item frame on its side, except for the Mini XP Farm which uses a dispenser facing any direction!**

**You can upgrade your Mini Factories to generate faster loot by placing an emerald ore block behind the dropper, behind the item frame!**
- **So the order is: item frame with item > dropper facing up > emerald ore!**

<details>
<summary>Wood Factories</summary>

Put the sappling of the tree type you want in the item frame and put a matching log on top of the dropper.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ore Factories</summary>

Put a diamond/emerald/lapis/redstone dust/gold ingot/iron ingot/copper ingot/coal in the item item frame and put the matching block(not the ore) on top of the dropper.

</details>



</details>
